author: uuq007
description: Add colored highlights, inline comments and ruby (phonetic) annotations to notes while keeping original Markdown untouched - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: uuq007
manifest.description: 为 Markdown 笔记添加标注、高亮和批注，使用自定义视图渲染.| Add colored highlights, inline comments and ruby (phonetic) annotations to notes while keeping original Markdown untouched.
manifest.name: Annotation Marker

name: Annotation Marker

releases.author: uuq007
releases.description:
## 修复 / Bug Fixes

### 标注文字颜色不再被改变 / Annotation text color is now preserved

- 修复阅读模式下高亮标注改变原文字体颜色的问题（通过 CSS `color: inherit` 覆盖 Obsidian 和主题的默认样式）

  Fixed highlight annotations changing original text color in reading mode (CSS `color: inherit` overrides Obsidian and theme defaults)

- 修复实时预览/编辑模式下高亮标注改变原文字体颜色的问题

  Fixed highlight annotations changing text color in live preview / editing mode

- 修复自定义 HTML 块（如 heti 诗歌排版）中标注文字颜色改变的问题（内联 `color:inherit` 确保所有渲染上下文生效）

  Fixed annotation text color in custom HTML blocks (inline `color:inherit` ensures all rendering contexts are covered)

### 标注选区范围限制 / Annotation selection scope restriction

- 选中 frontmatter / 笔记属性区域文字不再弹出添加标注菜单

  Selecting text in frontmatter / note properties area no longer triggers the add-annotation menu

- 选中内联标题 / 标题栏文件名不再弹出添加标注菜单

  Selecting inline title / header title no longer triggers the add-annotation menu

### 标注视图标题不可编辑 / Annotation view title is now non-editable

- 标注视图中的标题元素（`.inline-title`、`.view-header-title`）设为不可编辑，防止误操作

  Title elements in annotation view (`.inline-title`, `.view-header-title`) are now non-editable to prevent accidental edits

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker/compare/3.0.9...3.0.10

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker/compare/3.0.9...3.0.10
releases.name: v3.0.10

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v3.0.9 Bug 修复 / Bug Fixes

### 🐛 修复 / Fixes

**重启恢复保护 / Restart Recovery Protection**

- 修复重启 Obsidian 时，非标注标签页被错误替换为标注视图的问题。现在只有原本在标注模式的标签页会被恢复，其他标签页内容保持不变。
- Fixed an issue where non-annotation tabs were incorrectly replaced with annotation views after restarting Obsidian. Now only tabs that were in annotation mode are restored; other tabs remain unchanged.

**自动进入标注模式 / Auto-enter Annotation Mode**

- 修复启用"自动进入标注模式"后，在新标签页打开同一笔记时不会自动进入标注模式的问题。
- Fixed an issue where opening the same note in a new tab did not auto-enter annotation mode when the setting was enabled.

**标注列表面板清理 / Annotation Panel Cleanup**

- 修复在标注视图中切换到其他文件后，标注列表面板图标仍然残留的问题。
- Fixed annotation list panel icon remaining visible after switching to a different file from annotation view.

**视图标题同步 / View Title Sync**

- 修复标注模式下 `.view-header-title` 未更新为"【标注视图】"格式的问题。
- Fixed `.view-header-title` not updating to the annotation view title format.

**实时预览 HTML 展开 / Live Preview HTML Expansion**

- 修复实时预览模式下添加标注后 HTML 源码展开的问题。
- Fixed HTML source code expanding in live preview mode after adding an annotation.

### 🔧 代码优化 / Code Improvements

- 提取 `hasOtherLeafWithFile` helper 方法消除重复代码
- 合并 `layout-change` 和 `refreshAnnotationView` 中的重复 leaf 迭代
- Extracted `hasOtherLeafWithFile` helper to eliminate duplicate code
- Consolidated redundant leaf iterations in `layout-change` and `refreshAnnotationView`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker/compare/3.0.8...3.0.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v3.0.8

### 多标签页标注模式支持 / Multi-tab Annotation Mode Support

- 修复同一笔记打开多个标签页进入标注模式时，只有一个标签页显示标注列表按钮的问题
- 修复逐一退出标注模式时，只有第一个标签页能退出，其他提示"标注文件创建失败"的问题
- 在任一标签页添加标注后，所有标签页都能正确渲染高亮
- Fixed only one tab showing the annotation list button when multiple tabs of the same note enter annotation mode
- Fixed only the first tab being able to exit annotation mode while others show "Failed to create annotation file"
- Annotations added in any tab now render correctly across all tabs

### 重启恢复增强 / Enhanced Restart Recovery

- 支持恢复多标签页和多分屏的标注视图（之前只能恢复单标签页）
- 修复第二次重启后标注视图变为空白的问题
- 修复恢复过程中 session 被误清理的问题
- Supports restoring annotation views for multiple tabs and split panes (previously only single tab)
- Fixed annotation views becoming blank after the second restart
- Fixed sessions being incorrectly cleaned up during the recovery process

### 标题国际化 / Title Internationalization

- 标签页标题和视图区域标题同步显示标注模式标识
- 中文显示 `【标注视图】文件名`，英文显示 `【Anno Mode】filename`
- Tab title and view header title now both display annotation mode indicator
- Chinese: `【标注视图】filename`, English: `【Anno Mode】filename`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker/compare/3.0.7...3.0.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes / 错误修复

- **Fix: Annotation click menu not showing in Live Preview mode**.
- **修复：实时预览模式下点击标注不弹出详情菜单** 
- **Fix: `previewContainer` check incorrectly filtering Live Preview clicks**. 
- **修复：实时预览模式下 previewContainer 检查误判** 

- **Fix: Delete button not closing the annotation detail menu**.
- **修复：删除按钮点击后标注详情菜单不消失**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker/compare/3.0.6...3.0.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🐛 Bug 修复 / Bug Fixes

### 修复编辑模式光标消失问题 / Fix cursor disappearing in editor mode

**中文：**

在标注视图的阅读模式下执行删除操作后切换到编辑视图，光标会消失且无法输入文字，必须切换窗口才能恢复。

- **CM6 编辑器焦点丢失**：编辑模式下点击标注 HTML embed 时，mousedown 处理器拦截事件后未恢复编辑器焦点，现已在拦截后主动恢复焦点
- **浏览器 `confirm()` 破坏焦点**：删除确认使用的浏览器原生 `confirm()` 对话框会彻底破坏 Obsidian 的焦点管理，现已替换为 Obsidian Modal
- **刷新时光标丢失**：编辑模式下刷新标注视图时会丢失光标位置，现已在内容更新时同步保存/恢复光标

**English:**

After performing a delete operation in reading mode of the annotation view, switching to editor mode would cause the cursor to disappear, making text input impossible until the window was switched.

- **CM6 editor focus loss**: When clicking on an annotation HTML embed in editor mode, the mousedown handler intercepted the event without restoring editor focus. Now proactively restores focus after interception
- **Browser `confirm()` breaking focus**: The native browser `confirm()` dialog used for delete confirmation completely broke Obsidian's focus management. Replaced with Obsidian Modal to prevent focus loss
- **Cursor loss during refresh**: Refreshing the annotation view in editor mode would lose cursor position. Now saves and restores cursor position during content updates

---

**Files changed / 修改文件：**
- `src/view/annotationViewPlugin.ts` — 焦点恢复 / focus restoration
- `src/ui/AnnotationMenu.ts` — Modal 替换 confirm / replace confirm with Modal
- `src/ui/SelectionMenu.ts` — 菜单关闭恢复焦点 / restore focus on menu close
- `src/ui/ExportModal.ts` — 通用化确认弹窗 / generalize confirm modal
- `src/sidebar/AnnotationSidebarView.ts` — Modal 替换 confirm / replace confirm with Modal
- `src/main.ts` — 编辑模式检查 + 光标保持 / editor mode check + cursor preservation
- `src/utils/focusManager.ts` — 新增焦点保护工具 / new focus protection utility

releases.author: uuq007
releases.description:
## 修复 / Fixes

- **全文标注跳过代码块区域**：全文标注时，围栏代码块（` ```...``` `）和内联代码（`` `...` ``）中的匹配不再被标注，仅标注正文中的匹配位置。
- **标注视图标签页标题**：进入标注模式后，标签页标题显示为 `【标注视图】文件名` 格式，方便区分普通视图和标注视图。

---

- **Full-text annotation skips code blocks**: When performing full-text annotation, matches inside fenced code blocks (` ```...``` `) and inline code (`` `...` ``) are now excluded. Only matches in the main text are annotated.
- **Annotation view tab title**: When entering annotation mode, the tab header now displays `【标注视图】filename` to distinguish the annotation view from the normal view.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker/compare/3.0.4...3.0.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 更新内容

- **修复**：双链（Wiki-Link）格式无法正确添加标注的问题
  - 选中完整的双链文本时，标注自动包裹整个 `[[...]]`，不再破坏链接语法
  - 仅选中双链内部分文字时，提示用户无法标注部分双链文本

## Changes

- **Fix**: Annotations could not be correctly added to wiki-link text (e.g. `[[target|display]]`)
  - When selecting the full wiki-link display text, the annotation now wraps the entire `[[...]]` without breaking the link syntax
  - When selecting partial text within a wiki-link, a notice informs the user that partial wiki-link annotation is not supported

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker/compare/3.0.3...3.0.4

releases.author: uuq007
releases.description:
## 更新内容

- **新功能**：i18n 国际化支持 — 根据 Obsidian 语言设置自动切换中英文界面（简体/繁体中文 → 中文，其他语言 → 英文）
- **改进**：将全部约 120 条 UI 字符串从硬编码中文提取为语言包，覆盖设置、菜单、侧边栏、模态框、通知等所有界面

## Changes

- **New**: i18n internationalization — UI language auto-switches based on Obsidian language setting (zh/zh-* → Chinese, others → English)
- **Improvement**: All ~120 UI strings extracted from hardcoded Chinese into locale packs, covering settings, menus, sidebar, modals, notices, and all interfaces

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker/compare/3.0.2...3.0.3

releases.author: uuq007
releases.description:
## 更新内容

- **新功能**：实装「批注最大长度」设置项，可在设置页面自定义批注字数上限
- **改进**：README.md 改为中英双语对照格式
- **修复**：统一所有批注输入框的字符限制，消除硬编码 400 与默认值 500 不一致的问题

## Changes

- **New**: Implemented "Max note length" setting, customizable in the settings page
- **Improvement**: README.md now in bilingual Chinese/English format
- **Fix**: Unified character limit across all note input fields, resolved inconsistency between hardcoded 400 and default 500

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker/compare/3.0.1...3.0.2

releases.author: uuq007
releases.description:
## 功能特点

- ✨ 不修改原文件：所有标注数据独立存储
- 🎨 多种标注颜色：红、蓝、黄、绿、紫、无色
- 📝 添加批注：为标注添加详细说明
- 🔤 注音功能：为文字添加注音（Ruby 标签）
- 🔄 自动同步：文件重命名、移动时自动迁移
- 🗑️ 自动清理：文件删除时自动清除标注
- 🎯 智能定位：渐进式搜索，准确匹配
- 📱 跨设备兼容：支持桌面端和移动端

## 安装

1. 下载附件中的三个文件
2. 将文件复制到 Obsidian 插件目录：`.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-annotation-marker/`
3. 在 Obsidian 设置 → 社区插件中启用插件

详细使用说明请查看 [README](https://github.com/uuq007/obsidian-annotation-marker#readme)
releases.name: v1.0.0 - Obsidian 标注插件
